ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., uint8, int32) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "size_bits" INTEGER /* Size of the data type in bits */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value that the data type can hold */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value that the data type can hold */,
  "is_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is signed */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the data type */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on performance considerations */,
  "storage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on storage considerations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case (e.g., ID generation, counters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the use case */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the use case is commonly used */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage scenarios for the use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_use_cases" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the use case */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is recommended for the use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "module_status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., in development, testing, production) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the module (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module using the data type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data type has been used */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the data type was last used */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the usage of the data type */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Context in which the data type is used (e.g., function, method, class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_usage_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data type was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_type_metadata" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Impact on performance when using this data type */,
  "storage_impact" TEXT /* Impact on storage when using this data type */,
  "recommended_use" TEXT /* Recommended use cases for this data type */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics */,
  "storage_metrics" TEXT /* Detailed storage metrics */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with different platforms or systems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_modules" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "module_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the module within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_data_types" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of data type usage in the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_recommendations" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the use case */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended data type */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "alternative_types" TEXT /* Alternative data types that can be used for the same use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id", "type_id")
)
